allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: remove leaked token, restructure project, add error handling

- Remove hardcoded GitLab token from .mcp.json, use env var reference
- Fix invalid JSON in .mcp.json
- Update .gitignore to exclude .env, .mcp.json, dist/, .playwright-cli/
- Activate dotenv and baseURL in playwright.config.ts
- Move codex-generator.ts to src/ with proper error handling
- Update codex-generator to use current OpenAI SDK \(chat.completions.create\)
- Create POM structure: tests/pages/base.page.ts, tests/fixtures/test-data.ts
- Add test directory scaffolding: tests/e2e/, tests/api/
- Create src/ directories matching tsconfig path aliases
- Add npm scripts for test, test:headed, test:ui, per-browser runs, report
- Add .env.example with all required environment variables
- Configure GitHub Actions workflow with secrets for CI env vars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(python -c " import re with open\(''test_tr_ids_tmp.txt''\) as f: found = set\(\) for line in f: m = re.search\(r''TR-\(\\d+\)'', line.strip\(\)\) if m: found.add\(int\(m.group\(1\)\)\) expected = set\(\) for i in range\(1, 1064\): expected.add\(i\) expected.add\(1132\) expected.add\(1133\) missing = sorted\(expected - found\) extra = sorted\(found - expected\) print\(f''Expected TR IDs: {len\(expected\)}''\) print\(f''Found in tests: {len\(found\)}''\) print\(f''Missing \({len\(missing\)}\):''\) for m in missing: print\(f'' TR-{m}''\) if extra: print\(f''Extra \({len\(extra\)}\):''\) for e in extra: print\(f'' TR-{e}''\) ")
